title: ipomoea batatas var. apiculata
intro: Ipomoea batatas var. apiculata, commonly known as purple yam, is a variety of the sweet potato plant that is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of purple yam include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as diabetes and heart disease, as well as improving cognitive function and reducing stress. Purple yam can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs and ingredients in traditional remedies.
